---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or a "SKIBI-UPGRADE" for the app.
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: Shaiyon69
---

## 🧐 The Problem
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "It's hard to see the messages in the dark.")

## ✨ The Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g. "Add a Dark Mode toggle in the settings.")

## 🛠️ How it helps
Why is this important for MessApp? How does it make the app better?

## 🎨 Design Ideas (Optional)
Any specific colors, layouts, or "vibes" you have in mind? Feel free to link a Figma or draw a sketch.

---
> "Evolving MessApp one MESS at a time." 🚀
